top_signals.title: China Says UK Ties ‘Returning to Normal’ After Years of Tension
top_signals.summary: Britain should set out a path for more Chinese investment as relations between the two countries normalize, Foreign Minister Wang Yi said while welcoming his counterpart Yvette Cooper.

top_signals.title: Nvidia's new PC chips represent CEO Huang's bid to win at every layer of AI stack
top_signals.summary: Nvidia's announced entry into the PC chip market sent shares of AMD, Intel and Qualcomm lower as Wall Street recognized the threat.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Orla halts Mexico mine operations amid worker blockade
top_signals.summary: Union has stopped operations at Camino Rojo, creating uncertainty around production at Orla’s flagship gold mine.

top_signals.title: Barrick weighs UK listing for African assets in $30B tie-up with Endeavour
top_signals.summary: The move is identical to what Barrick did some 20 years ago with the Acacia spin-off, Reuters said.
